goal: Narrow the March 20, 2025 Sentinel review from draft planning bbox clips to a draft-bank window and measure whether the corridor-local cloud/shadow contamination allows source-drape promotion.

method.coordinate_transform: Inline WGS84 to UTM Transverse Mercator calculation using WGS84 ellipsoid constants; validated by reproducing the existing January/March planning-bbox pixel windows.
method.pixel_model: Sentinel-2 TCI uses 10 m pixels at 10980x10980 and SCL uses 20 m pixels at 5490x5490 on the same tile origins.
method.clip_algorithm: Compute a UTM bbox around the draft bank-line bounds plus 250 m context, clamp against each Sentinel tile, crop TCI and SCL windows, then downsample to 1024 px wide review strips.
limitations: The source bank geometry is generated from the Unreal preview scaffold and is not official Costa Rica hydrography, surveyed bank geometry, wetted width, or protected-area-safe publication geometry.
The TCI strips are not masked by SCL; the companion SCL strips are QA references only.
The clips are narrow bbox strips around draft banks, not a polygon route clip, stitched mosaic, source drape, material input, or mask source.

outputs.visual_review: Narrow route-context strip is useful for seeing the draft corridor, but clouds and shadows intersect the right/eastern part of the draft-bank window.
Narrow route-context strip is cleaner than January but still has scattered cloud/shadow crossing the draft corridor.

outputs.review_decision: Cloud/shadow fraction is higher in the draft-bank window than in the broader bbox, so this strip is blocked from source-drape promotion.
Cloud/shadow fraction is higher in the draft-bank window than in the broader bbox, so this strip is blocked from source-drape promotion.

windowed_read_decision.decision: The March 20 scene is a better candidate than January, but the draft-bank window has corridor-local cloud/shadow contamination and preview-scaffold bank geometry. Do not promote to Pacuare source drape or masks.

forbidden_use: production water or vegetation mask generation
promotion_blockers: Replace preview-scaffold bank geometry with official or guide-approved route/bank geometry.
Find a cleaner same-date or alternate scene, or apply exact route-window SCL masking and prove enough usable corridor remains.
Stitch only after exact clipping, SCL/cloud/shadow QA, seam review, scale review, and terms review pass.
Record guide/geospatial approval before any imagery-derived Pacuare material or lifelike capture claim.
